summary: Completed comprehensive testing of sound effects system implementation (5th iteration). All sound integration features working correctly. Frontend compiles successfully with sound context properly integrated across all game pages.
passed_tests: Sound toggle button visible in navbar with data-testid='sound-toggle'
Sound toggle shows Volume2 icon when enabled, VolumeX icon when muted
Sound toggle click successfully toggles between muted/unmuted states
Sound mute state persists in localStorage with key 'cooe-sound-muted'
Win Go page renders without errors with sound context integration
Aviator page renders without errors with sound context integration
AB Fun page renders without errors with sound context integration
Lucky Hit page renders without errors with sound context integration
Soccer Go page renders without errors with sound context integration
Daily Bonus page renders without errors with sound context integration
AB Fun card flip sound integration tested (game played successfully)
Win Go timer display and betting interface functional
Win Go mode tabs (30s, 1min, 3min, 5min) visible and functional
All game betting interfaces properly integrated with sound context
Frontend compiles without errors (only minor ESLint warnings)
SoundContext provides 14 different sound types via Web Audio API
Sound system uses procedural generation (no external audio files)
All game pages maintain sound toggle visibility in navbar
